title: ervum cuspidatum
intro: Ervum cuspidatum, also known as the horse bean or scabra, is a plant species in the legume family native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ervum cuspidatum include its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve kidney function, making it a useful treatment for conditions such as hypertension and kidney stones. Ervum cuspidatum can be prepared as an herbal tea or used in tinctures, with the dried leaves and roots often being used in traditional medicine.
